name: Zora Ideale
description: ~!Zora is the son of Zara Ideale, the first commoner Magic Knight, and is a rogue member of Clover Kingdom's Black Bull squad. He assumes the identity of Xerx Lugner during the Royal Knights Selection Exam. Zora changes during the Selection Exam where he begins to take on a similar mindset to his father, with a strong trust in his comrades. The current Wizard King confronts Zora after the exam, speaking of how he was a friend of his fathers having met on the battlefield. The Wizard King prompts Zora to join the Magic Knight Squad he belongs in (presumably the Black Bulls), however Zora shrugs this off, ignoring the Wizard King. !~
